# Braids by Miami

Luxury protective styling by Yulis serving the Miami, Florida area.

## Pages

- [/](/) – Home
- [/services/](/services/) – Services: Knotless braids, Box braids, Feed-in cornrows, Goddess/boho braids, Twists, Bridal or event styling
- [/locations/](/locations/) – Locations: 21346 SW 112th Ave, Cutler Bay, FL 33189
- [/photos/](/photos/) – Portfolio gallery
- [/about/](/about/) – About Yulis
- [/blog/](/blog/) – Blog posts
- [/contact/](/contact/) – Appointment request form (submits via thinksmart.life backend)

## Languages

- English: [/contact/](/contact/), [/services/](/services/), etc.
- Spanish: [/es/contact/](/es/contact/), [/es/services/](/es/services/), etc.

- Static site hosted on GitHub Pages
- Contact form submits to https://thinksmart.life/forms/braidsbymiami/submit
